---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What user or contributor problem would this solve?

## Proposed solution

Describe the smallest useful version of the change.

## Mode or area

- Decision Mode
- World Mode
- Simulation quality
- Evaluation or training data
- Persistence or deployment
- Documentation
- Other:

## Tradeoffs

What complexity, cost, safety, privacy, or maintenance risk could this add?

## Alternatives considered

What simpler approaches or workarounds did you consider?

## Additional context

Use synthetic examples only. Do not include private user data, copyrighted source text, API keys, database URLs, or raw prompt logs.
